summary: Backend-only testing of User Intelligence Layer (/api/intel/*) and Vibe Credits Reward Economy (/api/rewards/*) additive endpoints, plus regression checks on the existing /api/vibes/*, /api/feedback, /api/admin/* endpoints. All 67 pytest tests pass (56 pre-existing + 11 new intel/rewards). Curl sanity checks confirm negative paths (400 for unknown earn action, 404 for unknown venue / trajectory, 404 for offer on unknown venue) and positive paths on all regression endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: Rewards rule map is returned directly from service (rewards/rules). Acceptance criteria only requires feedback=1, visit=3, navigate=1; implementation also exposes daily_login=1 and first_visit_bonus=5 — acceptable additive surface, documented via /rules.

POST /api/rewards/earn accepts an explicit {amount} that overrides rule validation (used for 'seed' action in tests). This is a deliberate bypass — ensure production callers never expose this path to untrusted clients; consider requiring an admin/service token if/when auth is added.
Scheduler now also runs append_current_scores() + detect_visits() after each refresh. No observable regression; existing signal-engine tests pass.
Test file previously required REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to be exported in shell; not a code bug — pytest was invoked with env var set (fixed in this iteration by exporting before run).
test_credentials: none required (no auth on these endpoints)
seed_data_creation: Used existing 12 NYC venues already seeded in PostgreSQL (via prior `python -m app.seed` run). No new seeding performed in this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run pytest with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://nightlife-tracking.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/ -q`. All 67 tests pass. Intel flow returns 33 venues (seeded count grew beyond the initial 12 across iterations — idempotent-unsafe seeder as noted by main agent; tests tolerate this). New endpoints confirmed via curl: /api/rewards/rules, /api/rewards/wallet/{uid}, /api/rewards/earn, /api/rewards/offers (CRUD), /api/rewards/redeem, /api/rewards/redemptions, /api/intel/ping, /api/intel/visits/detect, /api/intel/visits/{venue_id}, /api/intel/flow, /api/intel/trajectory/snapshot, /api/intel/trajectory/{venue_id}.
